column1: # CAC40 constituent tickers — Yahoo Finance format
# Verified: 2026-06-19 (manual extraction from Euronext live page)

#   weight 4.14%) — it was accidentally omitted in the manual page copy.
# ArcelorMittal (MT.AS): Yahoo Finance uses the Euronext Amsterdam primary listing;
#   it is the only constituent that does not follow the .PA pattern.
# Stellantis (STLAP.PA): Paris MNEMO is STLAP; verify on first yfinance run.
# ICB sectors for the 15 stocks absent from the composition PDF are assigned
#   from standard ICB Level-1 classification (not official Euronext data).
